The '''Ghrag Mercenaries''' were one of the many enemies of the [[Civilian Protection Guild]], particularly of [[Eyma]], one of its members, on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] homeworld of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. They had a [[Ghrag Mercenaries Base|base]] in the [[Tyyyn Nebula]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the Ghrag stole a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] from the Civilian Protection Agency. It was soon recaptured from them by a group of spacers that had been sent by Eyma.

In space battles, Ghrag pilots flew [[Kihraxz assault fighter]]s, [[Ixiyen-class fast attack craft|''Ixiyen''-class fast attack crafts]], [[Rihkxyrk assault fighter]]s and [[X4 Gunship/Legends|X4 Gunships]].<ref name="SWG:RotW" />

{{Stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Ghrag Mercenaries appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies]], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:RotW" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
